excerpt: In this post, you’ll learn how to use Amazon Nova Sonic, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, and Strands BidiAgent to build scalable, maintainable voice agents that handle these challenges efficiently, resulting in more responsive and intelligent customer interactions. We’ll explore three popular architectural patterns for voice agents, highlighting their trade-offs and best practices for minimizing latency.

title: Scalable voice agent design with Amazon Nova Sonic: multi-agent, tools, and session segmentation
